section.title: Analytics Command Center

summary.headline: AI-first full-stack engineer translating applied learning into practical product systems.
summary.description: Gautam's strongest combined signal is the ability to connect typed frontend experiences, backend architecture, AI workflows, and computer vision concepts into recruiter-readable products.
